title: Package Agent Skill Starter Kit marketplace-readiness evidence
objective: Convert the existing local Agent Skill Starter Kit proof bundle and gated service-request packets into an auditable local readiness packet without browser, account, marketplace, payment, public, or legal/KYC/tax action.
allowed_actions: read local proof and build reports
read local service-request packets as blocked-gate context

approval_requirements.scope: Not required for this local packaging packet; required before marketplace terms or current-source verification.
Not required for this local packaging packet; required before seller setup, payout setup, tax/KYC, terms acceptance, listing, or sale.
Not required for this local packaging packet; required before any listing, upload, public post, promotion, or submission.

context_artifacts.purpose: Proves the local product bundle exists and passed file-level acceptance checks.
Defines product hypothesis, buyer, gated marketplace routes, and local-only acceptance criteria.
Local Markdown product bundle to package for future review.
Blocked marketplace browser-read-only review packet; context only.
Blocked legal/KYC/tax/payment review packet; context only.

success_criteria: all adapters prepare or materialize local-only artifact plans without external execution
result files are written and linked from aggregate reports
service request packets remain needs_review and are not started
